# bai_s3tables_table (Resource)

Manages an S3 Tables Iceberg table via the AWS Glue catalog.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the table.
- `namespace` (String) Glue database name (namespace) that contains the table.
- `region` (String) AWS region for table
- `warehouse` (String) Warehouse identifier the S3 table bucket (`{account}:s3tablescatalog/{name}`).

### Optional

- `field` (Block List) Iceberg schema column. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--field))
- `format_version` (String) Iceberg format version. Accepted values: `2` (default) or `3`. Version 3 is required to use column default values.
- `partition` (Block List) Iceberg partition field. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--partition))
- `property` (Block List) Iceberg properties field. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--property))

<a id="nestedblock--field"></a>
### Nested Schema for `field`

Required:

- `name` (String) Column name.
- `type` (String) Iceberg type: `boolean`, `int`, `long`, `float`, `double`, `date`, `time`, `timestamp`, `timestamptz`, `string`, `binary`, `uuid`, `fixed[N]`, `decimal(P,S)`.

Optional:

- `default_bool` (Boolean) Default value for bool column. At most one of `default_string`, `default_bool` or `default_number` should be set.
- `default_number` (Number) Default value for integer or float column. At most one of `default_string`, `default_bool` or `default_number` should be set.
- `default_string` (String) Default value for string column. At most one of `default_string`, `default_bool` or `default_number` should be set.
- `doc` (String) Documentation string for the column.
- `required` (Boolean) Whether the column is non-nullable. Defaults to `false`.


<a id="nestedblock--partition"></a>
### Nested Schema for `partition`

Required:

- `name` (String) Name for this partition field.
- `source_name` (String) Name of the source column to partition by.
- `transform` (String) Partition transform: `identity`, `year`, `month`, `day`, `hour`, `bucket[N]`, `truncate[N]`.


<a id="nestedblock--property"></a>
### Nested Schema for `property`

Required:

- `name` (String) Property name.
- `value` (String) Property value.
